mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_login_security ( user_id, failed_login_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE user_login_security SET failed_login_count = CASE WHEN last_failed_at IS NULL OR last_failed_at < DATE_SUB(#{failedAt}, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) THEN 1 ELSE failed_login_count + 1 END, last_failed_at = #{failedAt}, locked_until = CASE WHEN last_failed_at IS NULL OR last_failed_at < DATE_SUB(#{failedAt}, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) THEN NULL WHEN failed_login_count + 1 >= 5 THEN DATE_ADD(#{failedAt}, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) ELSE NULL END WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_login_security SET failed_login_count = 0, last_failed_at = NULL, locked_until = NULL, last_login_at = #{loginAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
